name: GitHub Issues source (example)
author: Symphony
description: Reference issue-source plugin: pulls open GitHub issues from the configured repos as Symphony tasks, and pushes terminal task status back to the issue (comment + close on completion). Reads its PAT + repos from <install-dir>/config.json. Demonstrates the @symphony/plugin-sdk provides.issueSource contract — fetch_open_issues + write_back_status, wrapped host-side into the same ingest + writeback pipeline the in-tree connectors use.
